SEARCH
Package org.vorpal.blade.framework.callflow

Class Callflow

java.lang.Object
org.vorpal.blade.framework.callflow.Callflow
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Bye, Callflow481, Cancel, InitialInvite, Passthru, ProxyBye, ProxyBye, ProxyCancel, ProxyCancel, ProxyInvite, ProxyInvite, ProxyInvite, ProxyPassthru, ProxyPassthru, ProxyReinvite, ProxyReinvite, Reinvite
public abstract class Callflow extends Object implements Serializable
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Copy non-system headers with the exception of Contact for REGISTER requests.

    copyHeaders(SipServletResponse copyFrom, SipServletResponse copyTo)
    Copy non-system headers with the exception of Contact for REGISTER responses, 3xx and 485 responses, and 200/OPTIONS responses.

    copyHeadersMsg(SipServletMessage copyFrom, SipServletMessage copyTo)

    copyParameters(URI from, URI to)

    • pullCallback

      public static Callback<SipServletRequest> pullCallback(SipServletRequest request)
      Not to be called by the end user. This method finds the callback method associated with either the SipSession or SipApplicationSession. Special logic is in place to not clear the callback if the request is a NOTIFY with a sipfrag of less that 200.
      Parameters:
      request -
      Returns:
      the callback method

    • pullCallback

      public static Callback<SipServletResponse> pullCallback(SipServletResponse response)

    • pullCallback

    • cancelTimer

      @Deprecated public void cancelTimer(SipApplicationSession appSession, String timerId)
      Deprecated.

    • startTimer

      public static String startTimer(SipApplicationSession appSession, long delay, boolean isPersistent, Callback<ServletTimer> lambdaFunction)
      Creates a one-time ServletTimer and schedules it to expire after the specified delay.
      Parameters:
      appSession - the application session with which the new ServletTimer is to be associated
      delay - delay in milliseconds before timer is to expire
      isPersistent - if true, the ServletTimer will be reinstated after a shutdown be it due to complete failure or operator shutdown
      lambdaFunction -
      Returns:
      the newly created ServletTimer's id

    • startTimer

      public static String startTimer(SipApplicationSession appSession, long delay, long period, boolean fixedDelay, boolean isPersistent, Callback<ServletTimer> lambdaFunction)
      Parameters:
      appSession - the application session with which the new ServletTimer is to be associated
      delay - delay in milliseconds before timer is to expire
      period - time in milliseconds between successive timer expirations
      fixedDelay - if true, the repeating timer is scheduled in a fixed-delay mode, otherwise in a fixed-rate mode
      isPersistent - if true, the ServletTimer will be reinstated after a shutdown be it due to complete failure or operator shutdown
      lambdaFunction -
      Returns:
      the newly created ServletTimer's id

    • stopTimer

      public static void stopTimer(SipApplicationSession appSession, String timerId)
      Cancels the timer.
      Parameters:
      appSession -
      timerId -

    • stopTimers

      public static void stopTimers(SipApplicationSession appSession)
      Stops all timers for the application session.
      Parameters:
      appSession -

    • expectRequest

      public Expectation expectRequest(SipSession sipSession, String method, Callback<SipServletRequest> callback)
      Use this method to create a lambda expression which is called when a particular SIP method like CANCEL is expected. Using this technique means you don't have to write a complete CANCEL Callflow class. How convenient!
      Parameters:
      sipSession -
      method -
      callback -
      Returns:
      an expectation object

    • expectRequest

      public Expectation expectRequest(SipApplicationSession appSession, String method, Callback<SipServletRequest> callback)
      Use this method to create a lambda expression which is called when a particular SIP method like CANCEL is expected. Using this technique means you don't have to write a complete CANCEL Callflow class. How convenient!
      Parameters:
      appSession -
      method -
      callback -
      Returns:
      an expectation object

    • createVorpalSessionId

      public static String createVorpalSessionId(SipApplicationSession appSession)

    • getVorpalSessionId

      public static String getVorpalSessionId(SipApplicationSession appSession)

    • createVorpalDialogId

      public static String createVorpalDialogId(SipSession sipSession)

    • getVorpalDialogId

      public static String getVorpalDialogId(SipSession sipSession)

    • sendRequest

      public void sendRequest(SipServletRequest request, Callback<SipServletResponse> lambdaFunction) throws ServletException, IOException
      Sends a SipServletRequest object. Supplies a SipServletResponse object to the user as part of the lambda function.
      Parameters:
      request -
      lambdaFunction -
      Throws:
      ServletException
      IOException

    • sendRequest

      public void sendRequest(SipServletRequest request) throws ServletException, IOException
      Sends a SipServletRequest object. This method does not supply a SipServletResponse object to the user. (Useful for messages like ACK or INFO.)
      Parameters:
      request -
      Throws:
      ServletException
      IOException

    • sendRequestsInSerial

      public void sendRequestsInSerial(long milliseconds, List<SipServletRequest> requests, Callback<SipServletResponse> lambdaFunction) throws ServletException, IOException
      Sends multiple requests (INVITE) in serial.
      Parameters:
      milliseconds - timer duration in milliseconds for each request
      requests - a list of SipServletRequest objects
      lambdaFunction - supplies a SipServletResponse object
      Throws:
      ServletException
      IOException

    • sendRequestsInParallel

      public void sendRequestsInParallel(long milliseconds, List<SipServletRequest> requests, Callback<SipServletResponse> lambdaFunction) throws ServletException, IOException
      Sends multiple requests (INVITE) in parallel.
      Parameters:
      milliseconds - timer duration in milliseconds for all requests
      requests - a list of SipServletRequest objects
      lambdaFunction - supplies a SipServletResponse object
      Throws:
      ServletException
      IOException

    • makeReliable

      public SipServletResponse makeReliable(SipServletResponse response)
      Marks the response to be sent 'reliably', meaning you should expect at PRACK request.
      Parameters:
      response - a SipServletResponse object
      Returns:
      the same response as the input parameter

    • withholdResponse

      public void withholdResponse(SipServletResponse response)
      Mark the response as 'withheld' to prevent the method sendResponse() from actually sending the message. This gives the user the ability to prevent an automatically created response in the B2BUA or Proxy APIs from being sent back upstream.
      Parameters:
      response -

    • sendResponse

      public void sendResponse(SipServletResponse response, Callback<SipServletRequest> lambdaFunction) throws ServletException, IOException
      Send a response back upstream and expect an ACK/PRACK.
      Parameters:
      response -
      lambdaFunction -
      Throws:
      ServletException
      IOException

    • sendResponse

      public void sendResponse(SipServletResponse response) throws ServletException, IOException
      Send a response back upstream and do not expect and ACK/PRACK. If one is received, it will be absorbed by the framework without exception.
      Parameters:
      response -
      Throws:
      ServletException
      IOException

      copyTo -
      Returns:

    • processContinue

      public void processContinue() throws ServletException, IOException
      This method is designed to be overloaded by the developer. It is the natural continuation of calling 'doNotProcess';
      Throws:
      ServletException
      IOException

      public void processLater(SipServletRequest request, long delay_in_milliseconds)

    • createInitialRequest

      public static SipServletRequest createInitialRequest(URI endpoint, SipApplicationRoutingDirective directive, SipServletRequest initialRequest) throws ServletParseException, UnsupportedEncodingException, IOException
      Creates a new request by copying the content and headers from an initial request.
      Parameters:
      endpoint -
      directive -
      initialRequest -
      Returns:
      copy of initial request
      Throws:
      ServletParseException
      IOException
      UnsupportedEncodingException

    • createNewInitialRequest

      public static SipServletRequest createNewInitialRequest(URI endpoint, SipServletRequest initialRequest) throws ServletParseException, UnsupportedEncodingException, IOException
      Creates a new request with the NEW routing directive by copying the content and headers from an initial request.
      Parameters:
      endpoint -
      initialRequest -
      Returns:
      copy of initial request with the NEW routing directive
      Throws:
      ServletParseException
      IOException
      UnsupportedEncodingException

    • createContinueInitialRequest

      public static SipServletRequest createContinueInitialRequest(URI endpoint, SipServletRequest initialRequest) throws ServletParseException, UnsupportedEncodingException, IOException
      Creates a new request with the CONTINUE routing directive by copying the content and headers from an initial request.
      Parameters:
      endpoint -
      initialRequest -
      Returns:
      copy of initial request with the CONTINUE routing directive
      Throws:
      ServletParseException
      IOException
      UnsupportedEncodingException

    • createContinueInitialRequest

      public static SipServletRequest createContinueInitialRequest(URI endpoint, SipServletRequest template, SipServletRequest aliceRequest) throws ServletParseException, UnsupportedEncodingException, IOException
      Throws:
      ServletParseException
      UnsupportedEncodingException
      IOException

    • createRequest

      public static SipServletRequest createRequest(SipServletRequest aliceRequest) throws ServletParseException, UnsupportedEncodingException, IOException
      Throws:
      ServletParseException
      UnsupportedEncodingException
      IOException

    • copyParameters

      public static URI copyParameters(URI from, URI to) throws ServletParseException
      Copies user and parameters (that do not already exist) from one URI to another.
      Parameters:
      from -
      to -
      Returns:
      the update URI
      Throws:
      ServletParseException

    • proxyRequest

      public void proxyRequest(SipServletRequest inboundRequest, ProxyPlan ProxyPlan, Callback<SipServletResponse> lambdaFunction) throws IOException, ServletException
      Throws:
      IOException
      ServletException

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      Used for testing, this method prints the hash-codes system headers.
      Parameters:
      args - none required
